summary: Dark mode visibility testing completed successfully. All reported issues have been fixed. The 'Related Solutions' section now displays correctly with white text on dark background (rgb(10, 10, 10)). Theme toggle works properly. All tested pages show proper text visibility in dark mode.
critical_code_review_comments: RelatedSolutions.tsx correctly updated: line 47 now uses 'bg-white dark:bg-[#0a0a0a]' instead of gradient
ThemeContext.tsx correctly implements localStorage persistence with 'lexa-theme' key
globals.css has comprehensive dark mode overrides (lines 204-255) for text colors
All h2 headings use 'text-gray-900 dark:text-white' pattern for proper visibility
Gold accent color (#C9A962) used consistently for section labels and CTAs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode visibility is fully functional. Theme toggle is in header. localStorage key is 'lexa-theme'. To enable dark mode in tests: localStorage.setItem('lexa-theme', 'dark') then page.reload()
